name: Penny default
description: Generic built-in writing profiles for a self-contained Penny installation.

profiles.label: Reflective
profiles.description: Lived context, visible tension, reflection, principle, and action.
lockedRules: Preserve the writer's point of view and uncertainty when they matter.
Keep the source tension visible before resolving it.
Move from insight to a practical next step.
Keep people, teams, decisions, and workflows as the subject when they are doing the work.

profiles.label: Executive
profiles.description: Direct decision writing with context, tradeoffs, and next action.
lockedRules: Lead with the recommendation or practical point.
Name the context, risk, tradeoff, owner, and next action.
Use concrete nouns and active verbs.
Avoid short dramatic lines that do not state a fact, decision, or boundary.

profiles.label: Raw journal
profiles.description: Preserve unfinished thinking, questions, fragments, and task markers.
lockedRules: Preserve uncertainty, questions, fragments, and emotional reality.
Do not force polished rhythm rules onto raw notes.
